What are we doing here? Are we storing puppets? Are we displaying them? What's happening in your puppet world? Yeah, we're a museum, a puppet museum. We're also a performing arts center. So we have performances that involve puppets on stage, but then I work in the museum side of things.

So I'm the collections manager, which essentially just means I take care of the puppets in the museum. Okay, are we talking famous puppets here? Would these be puppets that I know?
